label: Lemlist
description: Automate cold email outreach and multi-channel sequences with Lemlist.

form.title: Connect Lemlist
form.subtitle: Paste your Lemlist API key to give Anton access to your campaigns and leads.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Lemlist API key from Team Settings. No OAuth setup required — the fastest way to connect.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with an API Key

Lemlist exposes a stable API key per team that grants full API access.

### Steps

1. Log in to [Lemlist](https://app.lemlist.com).
2. Click your avatar or team name in the bottom-left corner.
3. Go to **Settings → Integrations** (or navigate directly to **Team Settings → API**).
4. Under the **API** section, click **Generate** if no key exists, or copy the existing key.
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

### Notes

- The API key grants access to all campaigns and lead data for your team — keep it secret.
- If you regenerate the key in Lemlist, update it here to restore access.
- You can scope usage per sub-team only if your plan supports multiple teams; otherwise one key covers the whole workspace.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Lemlist → Settings → Integrations → API. Treat this like a password — anyone with it has full access to your team's account.
